title: JaredH4's Fun Items
description: Three Fun TNT Based Items for Your Minecraft Worlds.
body:
<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/XbJyfq_uqn4" title="I Coded 3 Fun Items into Minecraft 1.20.1!" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

I added a tnt bow, a tnt beam and a nuclear arrow to Minecraft 1.20.1!

This datapack is not meant for survival worlds, as it can cause massive amounts of destruction and only costs one arrow.

You might experience some lag due to the massive amounts of TNT in this datapack. Depending on how powerful your computer is.

The commands to get the Items are below:
```
TNT Bow: /function fun_items:give_items/tnt_bow
TNT Beam: /function fun_items:give_items/tnt_beam
TNT BEAM Bow: /function fun_items:give_items/tnt_beam_bow
Nuclear Arrow: /function fun_items:give_items/nuclear_arrow
```

Hope you enjoy this datapack as much as I have!
